---
name: duckdb
description: User-invoked router for DuckDB-related skills. Type this skill name to see which DuckDB skill to use.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# DuckDB Router

Index of the DuckDB data skills. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `attach-db` | Attach a DuckDB database file for querying in this session. |
| `query` | Run SQL against an attached database or ad-hoc against files. |
| `read-file` | Read or profile a local data file (CSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel, spatial, SQLite, Avro). |
| `convert-file` | Convert a data file from one format to another using DuckDB. |
| `s3-explore` | List, preview, or query data on S3/R2/GCS/MinIO without downloading it. |
| `spatial` | Query or analyze spatial data with DuckDB's spatial extension. |
| `duckdb-docs` | Search DuckDB or DuckLake documentation and blog posts. |
| `install-duckdb` | Install or update DuckDB extensions. |

These skills are model-invoked; you can type their names directly, or let the agent pick them when you mention the matching surface.
